task: Review contradiction arbitration risks for a bounded local replay exercise. Return bounded pressure, safeguards, and replay-separation checks only.

context.summary: Scenario fragment: a replay validator repair chain has two competing statements. Event S-004 says the validator must run with runtime profile v2.1 and strict hash checking. Later compressed summary text says v2.0 was sufficient and hash checking was optional. Review how full-lineage replay should preserve this contradiction without treating the review as public claim validation.
constraints: preserve visible-only versus full-lineage replay separation
preserve contradiction refs as advisory lineage
